name: MULTIPLE MYELOMA
definition: hematologic malignancy characterized by monoclonal proliferation of mature plasma cells focal proliferation of malignant plasma cells without diffuse bone marrow involvement =

demographics.Histo: normal / pleomorphic plasma cells (not PATHOGNOMONIC), may be mistaken for
demographics.Genetics: deletion of chromosome 13q14 (del13q14), amplification of chromosome 1q21

dominant_finding: low signal intensity on T1WI + high SI on T2WI
distribution: sparing of posterior elements (no red marrow) (DDx: metastatic disease)
discriminating_features: sparing of posterior elements (no red marrow) (DDx: metastatic disease)
paraspinal soft-tissue mass with extradural extension
scalloping of anterior margin of vertebral bodies (osseous pressure from adjacent
generalized osteopenia only (15%) with accentuation of trabecular pattern, especially in spine
